description_id.description: UUID belonging to the data description record

workspace.description: Top level grouping of the data

collection.description: Data collection. (gps, image, radar, ctd, etc...)

state.description: State of the data. This indicates if it is Raw data, processed data or product level data

topic.description: list of relevant research topics (glaciology, topography, geology, etc...)

format.description: Indicates what kind of data is contained in the resource. The options are json and/or binary.

altitude.description: altitude at this position in meters

date_time.description: date-time when the position was registered in ISO 8601 format

extra.description: dynamically expanding attribute group that can contain any extra info relevant to the record

cumulative_distance.description: distance traveled since the first measurement in meters

platform.description: platform the observation was made from (sledge, snow tractor, ship, etc...)

sensor_name.description: identifier used when multiple sensors are used for creating a dataset (sensor a, sensor vehicle...)

source_uri.description: persistent address where this record originates from

description_uri.description: uri pointing to the persistent web resouce describing this record
